quotes: Fluid wave forms in **two colorways**: **Sunshine/Gold** and **Sky Blue/Deep Blue**; each in **long and short** variants.
Construction: top wave layer at **70% transparency** over the base wave (Gold over Sunshine; Sky Blue over Deep Blue) — always preserve the layered, translucent quality.

rules.intent: Maintain brand consistency, depth, and layered quality of fluid wave forms.
rules.rule_text: Fluid wave forms must only be rendered in two paired colorways: Sunshine/Gold (#faa31b / #ffc60a) or Sky Blue/Deep Blue (#358ccb / #003d74), in either long or short variants. The top wave layer must maintain exactly a 70% transparency (opacity.logo.gold = 0.7) over the base wave layer (Gold layer over Sunshine base; Sky Blue layer over Deep Blue base) to preserve the layered, translucent style.

quotes: **Masthead gradient with logo mark** (Sunshine → 0C,10M,78Y,0K, logo mark placed at the lightest end) is the approved device for holding copy in masthead positions.

rules.intent: Standardize layout structure and visual style for hero masthead components.
rules.rule_text: To hold copy in masthead positions, use the approved device consisting of a masthead gradient (Sunshine #faa31b to light yellow 0C,10M,78Y,0K) with the logo mark positioned at the lightest end.
